what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an image asset (pitch-deck/p-01) to the design-source channel as an images attachment.
observations: No body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: Target uses an image:// URI scheme
concerns: No description, alt text, or title for the referenced image
No author or provenance beyond the timestamp
notes: A design-source channel attachment that points to pitch-deck image p-01, recorded on 2026-06-22.
questions: What is the content or slide number represented by p-01?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the image:// URI resolvable elsewhere in the system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the content: it is an images attachment record pointing to pitch-deck/p-01 in the design-source channel.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register an image asset in a channel memory ledger so the pitch-deck image can be referenced and retrieved by the design-source channel.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme to target an external media asset within a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel to an external image asset, enabling traceability of design-source media without embedding the asset itself.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment record that maps the design-source channel to the image asset image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-01 with an images attachment type and a 2026 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and link a pitch-deck image into the design-source channel memory for later reference.
